Well, how about yourself?
Doing?

Uh, we're in Houston.
Nice.
Where, where, where are you at?
I'm, uh, out in Scottsdale, Arizona.
Ok.

So great first time ever.
That's a great time to visit.

Maybe if you wanna call it, I don't know what it was like a wine grove or something.

Yeah, I've definitely got some, uh, some friends that have, like, were here and then moved back to their respective States and, uh, they, they seem to choose to visit during that time.
Coincidentally makes
sense.
It's amazing.

I mean, it seems like every night there's a, I mean, it's an insane headliner.
So that's, that's pretty cool too.
Yeah.

Really?

sure.

I know, it sounds like you were talking with Ben.
Uh curious if you know a lot if you know anything about apartment IQ and, and if there's anything in particular that kind of piqued your interest to jump on the call.
Yeah, so not a ton.

So I kind of kicked the can um and then be followed up but um really just kind of interested to see the product in the workings.
Um be transparent with you.
We currently, so we, we've got a portfolio about 80 assets and we currently have like market surveys woven into their bonus structure.
So obviously completing and um uploading like monthly.
And so I, I just wanna get more info, obviously I'm interested in, in the product, but that's like currently in place.
So it would, it would need to be a discussion of pros and cons because, you know, obviously the um the purpose of that is for them to, for one do.
Um Right, but to be, you know, closely involved with it and, and actually internalize the info.

So, you know, this is not anything that I've discussed with top level um to, to know their thoughts, but I would like to better understand just kind of uh ins and outs and, and what it is that that's provided.
Yeah,
for sure.
And that's actually a pretty awesome way to incentivize the, the teams to go out there and complete these things because I know they're tedious and a bit of a pain in the butt.
So that makes sense.
Um
I would say so I'll, I'll give you the quick high level on us.
Uh I mean, we're a B I tool, we're gonna provide you with market rate information on all of your competitors.
I always say that there's four things that make this product really unique.
Uh The first thing being and you'll see here in a second, but everything is 100% automated.
So there would be, you know, there would be no need to go out there and actually collect the, the, the market data yourselves.
We would automate that process for you.
Um The second thing in my opinion, the most important thing is that we actually update our data every single day.
So as I'm sure you're aware properties out there, they're on rep tools, they're changing rates regularly.
So our goal is for your team to be able to jump into there and see exactly what's going in the marketplace today.
Uh The third thing that's nice is that we can track any property out there as long as they have a website and use a property management software.
They do not have to be our customers whatsoever.
So we can track the entire market.
And uh more specifically the way we get our data is we actually go out to the property websites.

We collect the data from the property websites and then for us to get that unit level information, we'll go to the online leasing section of the property website, which is being powered by that property management software.
So that's why I was saying in order for us to track a comp, they do have to have a website and use a property management software.
Um Last thing I like, sorry.
Good.
I, I've got a question for you if you don't mind.
So when you say they use a property management software, it's
interesting to me.
Does it have to be one of the big ones?
So, like our group, for example, comes to mind, we have our own proprietary property management software that we use.
So it's not one of the big, you already, one site, you know, ResMed, whatever.
Um It's, it's kind of just ours.
So I'm just curious on like, for example, if, if y'all are able to get our data.
Yeah.
So right now we've got about 50 different scrapers going through these various property management Softwares.

I mean, I have all the unit level availability right there.
I mean, I have every metric that we would need to collect it.
We would just create a custom scraper for you guys.
So yeah, we can absolutely get it.
It's, it's, it's all there.
Got it.
Yeah.
Yeah.

So it's literally just what's on the property website.
I mean, we're not actually integrating with your property management software.
We're not getting any of that data that's kind of private or, or, you know, under the hood.
Um I do, I, I do like to mention that just because of the real page lawsuit.
Now, the already lawsuit centered around the sharing of private data, we have nothing to do with that.
It's literally us reflecting what's on the property website, repackaging it in a really pretty way and then, you know, providing insights based off of that.
Ok.
Um Are you guys using a rep tool right now?
So we, we have yields star at a, a handful of our properties, but for the majority of our portfolio, we are not.
Ok.
Oh.

Is, is it just concessions net effective rent, things like that?
Correct.

But um for the most part it's it's uh rents and uh concessions.
Nice.

Um And that's stemming from the the real page lawsuit so they just don't want to be involved in the sharing of private data.
So I think it will be tough to get a lot of the information from just calling around.
Yeah, I can, I can see that.
I, I don't know that we've had widespread issues just yet, but that's not to say that we haven't run into comps that will flat out refuse because we, we definitely have.
Yeah.
Yeah.
Makes sense.
Yeah.

cool.

right.

So we'll show you things like how far away each competitor is from your property you built total number of units advertised occupancy.
Uh You can see here that we show you exposure percentage over a couple of different time horizons.

How many are vacant?

And then lastly, the big one is we will let you know if there is a rent special or concession tied to the property or tied to a specific unit in the property.

And um I I will mention too what's nice is we, we take this a step further and we'll calculate that effective rent and that effective price per foot for you at the property level, at the floor plan level and all the way down to the actual unit level itself.
So, so I've

So for, for occupancy, the way we do this is we actually take it based off of the known number of vacant units.
So we divide everything that's vacant.
So like right here, there's, there's nine vacant units in the properties move in now and we divide the nine, the nine by the 284 by the total number of units in the property.
So occupancy is based off of just what's vacant.
